name: @solana/mosaic-sdk
description: SDK for Mosaic with helper functions for issuance and management of any token

_dependencyNotes.solanaKitV7: This SDK targets the Solana Kit v7 ecosystem (@solana/kit@^7, @solana/sysvars@^7). @solana-program/system and @solana-program/memo are on their kit-v7-native releases (0.13.0 / 0.12.0). @solana-program/token-2022 is the published 0.13.0 (kit-v7-native) — NO patch. token-2022 must be >=0.13.0 on kit v7 because 0.12.0's compiled code imports getMinimumBalanceForRentExemption from @solana/kit, which kit v7 removed. 0.13.0 ships every confidential helper this SDK consumes EXCEPT confidential mint/burn — transfer/withdraw/configure/apply/empty InstructionPlan helpers, PR #1269 (getConfidentialTransferInstructionPlan resolves the auditor from an optional mintAccount), deriveElGamalKeypairForOwnerMint/deriveAeKeyForOwnerMint, and subtractAmountFromCiphertext/subtractWithLoHiCiphertexts/extractCiphertextFromGroupedBytes all come from the @solana-program/token-2022/confidential subpath. The mint/burn InstructionPlan helpers (getConfidentialMintInstructionPlan/getConfidentialBurnInstructionPlan) and addWithLoHiCiphertexts do NOT exist in any published token-2022, so they are implemented locally here (confidential/mint-burn-plan.ts + mint-burn-proof.ts + ciphertext-math.ts) on top of @noble/curves (Ristretto point arithmetic zk-sdk doesn't expose) and @solana/zk-sdk (proof-data WASM). INTERIM: once the upstream Track A PR merges and a token-2022 release ships the mint/burn helpers, delete the local implementation and re-point mint.ts/burn.ts at @solana-program/token-2022/confidential (a one-line import change each), then drop @noble/curves. @solana/token-acl-sdk@0.4.0 declares an exact token-2022 0.12.0 dependency, forced up to 0.13.0 by the root override — safe because it only uses stable core exports (TOKEN_2022_PROGRAM_ADDRESS, getMintDecoder, ATA/metadata helpers, AccountState, Mint), unchanged across 0.10-0.13. The token-acl SDKs and @solana-program/zk-elgamal-proof@0.1.0 declare kit <=6 peer ranges but run correctly on kit v7 (they only touch codecs/signers/addresses; v7's only breaking changes — a type-only codec-union return-type widening, ReactiveStreamStore.connect(), a new instruction-planning error — are not exercised) and are forced onto v7 via the root @solana/kit + @solana/* overrides. See: https://github.com/anza-xyz/kit
